title: Recorded Future Playbook Alert Details
content:
A default playbook to fetch details of Playbook alert that does not yet have mapping made by Recorded Future

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Recorded Future pack (RecordedFuture, partner-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: RecordedFuturePlaybookAlerts.
raw_yaml:
id: Recorded Future Playbook Alert Details
version: -1
description: A default playbook to fetch details of Playbook alert that does not yet have mapping made by Recorded Future
name: Recorded Future Playbook Alert Details
starttaskid: "0"
fromversion: "6.5.0"
tasks:
  "0":
    id: "0"
    taskid: 05a84883-71da-45c9-81db-5f5cbcba9a21
    type: start
    task:
      id: 05a84883-71da-45c9-81db-5f5cbcba9a21
      version: -1
      description: Playbook Triggered
      name: ""
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - "1"
    separatecontext: false
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": 450,
          "y": 50
        }
      }
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
    isoversize: false
    isautoswitchedtoquietmode: false
  "1":
    id: "1"
    taskid: 909c3c54-d3ad-427f-827a-96c671a95f69
    type: regular
    task:
      id: 909c3c54-d3ad-427f-827a-96c671a95f69
      version: -1
      name: Get Alerts Details
      description: Get Playbook alert details by id.
      script: RecordedFuturePlaybookAlerts|||recordedfuture-playbook-alerts-details
      type: regular
      iscommand: true
      brand: RecordedFuturePlaybookAlerts
    scriptarguments:
      alert_ids:
        simple: ${incident.labels.playbook_alert_id}
    separatecontext: false
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": 450,
          "y": 230
        }
      }
    note: true
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
    isoversize: false
    isautoswitchedtoquietmode: false
view: |-
  {
    "linkLabelsPosition": {},
    "paper": {
      "dimensions": {
        "height": 275,
        "width": 380,
        "x": 450,
        "y": 50
      }
    }
  }
inputs: []
outputs: []
tests:
